data.title: Sika's Q1 2026 revenue hits CHF 2.49B, surpassing expectations.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in a decade. The stock market also surged, with the main index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this growth to an increase in consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. This positive economic outlook has led to predictions of continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Rapid Nutrition Strengthens Capital Markets Infrastructure with Appointment of Bowsprit Partners
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Rapid Nutrition PLC (Euronext Growth: ALRPD) based in London, a worldwide HealthTech and wellness company emphasizing evidence-based nutrition brands and technology-driven wellness solutions, has appointed Bowsprit Partners as Financial Adviser and Corporate Broker.

data.title: Responsible Fintech Institute Strengthens Global Policy Leadership with Appointment of Two Executive Fellows Amid Growing Complexity in Digital Finance
data.description: In Singapore, on April 13, 2026, the Responsible Fintech Institute (RFI) announced the addition of Distinguished Professor Patrick H. M. Loh and Professor Tek Yew Chia as Executive Fellows. These appointments come at a crucial time as global financial systems rapidly move towards increased integration.

data.title: HTX Research: How the Hormuz Shock Is Rewriting the Pricing Logic of the Crypto Market
data.description: In Panama City on April 13, 2026, HTX Research, the research division of HTX Group, unveiled a latest report titled "Hormuz Shock, U.S. Midterms, and the Repricing of the Crypto Market." According to the report, the overall macro framework has undergone a significant change from "easing-driven risk...". The report contains crucial insights into the current market trends and their implications moving forward.

data.title: Rippling Appoints Sonia Parandekar as SVP of Engineering and India Site Lead to Accelerate Global Product Expansion
data.description: Rippling, a prominent workforce management firm valued at $16.8 billion, has appointed Sonia Parandekar as the Senior Vice President of Engineering and leader of the Bengaluru site. This site plays a vital role in supporting Rippling’s worldwide product growth. With a focus on expanding its unified platform in HR, IT, and finance sectors, Rippling is heavily investing in top-tier engineering leadership to hasten product advancement and enhance its international presence.

data.title: Ex-CFTC chair Giancarlo exits law to specialize in crypto advising, after approving the first Bitcoin futures ETF.
data.description: Former CFTC chairman Chris Giancarlo, known for overseeing the approval of the first Bitcoin futures ETF, will be providing advice to fintech and digital asset founders and boards. After his time at the CFTC, Giancarlo is set to utilize his experience in the industry to guide companies in the burgeoning financial technology and cryptocurrency sectors. This move comes amid growing interest in digital assets, with Bitcoin recently reaching a market value of over $1 trillion and the overall cryptocurrency market surpassing $2 trillion. Giancarlo’s expertise is expected to be a valuable asset to firms navigating the rapidly evolving landscape of digital assets.

data.title: Bitcoin's price reaches close to $75K amid optimism for a US-Iran deal, triggering a $400M short squeeze.
data.description: Investor confidence in riskier assets has been boosted by the optimistic prospect of a potential US agreement with Iran to resolve ongoing conflict, with hopes of bringing an end to the weeks-long tensions.
